problem: Diabetes data is scattered across multiple devices (CGMs, insulin pumps, meters) and platforms, making it difficult for patients and clinicians to get a unified view for treatment decisions.
solution: Tidepool provides an open-source, cloud-based diabetes data platform that aggregates data from CGMs, insulin pumps, and meters into a single dashboard. The platform enables easy data sharing with caregivers and endocrinologists, supports telemedicine visits, and develops the FDA-cleared Tidepool Loop automated insulin delivery system.
